# Synthetic fixture — Claude Code actively thinking inside plan mode.
# Both the spinner footer AND the plan-mode banner are visible. This is the
# critical case that proves mode and activity are orthogonal dimensions:
# activity == "working" but mode == "plan".
#
# The spinner glyph ANIMATES (cycles through ✻ · ✶ etc.) so the anchor is
# the ellipsis + parenthesised duration, not the glyph itself.
#
# Expected: classify_activity -> "working", detect_mode -> "plan"
